backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a clothing store backend, defining types for products, cart items, orders, and user profiles, with CRUD operations for products, cart, orders, store content, and user management, all gated by an AccessControl/MixinAuthorization system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two fixes: resolving the Admin page infinite 'Verifying admin access' loading state, and fixing the admin-gating query logic in useQueries.ts to always settle.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, recent changes, and styling/logic details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry that configures TanStack Router with eight routes (home, catalog, product, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin, about) all nested under a Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer component displaying the studio logo, collection links (Cotton Shirts, Graphic T-Shirts, etc.), studio navigation links including an Admin Panel link, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with desktop category navigation, a centered logo, a cart icon with item count badge, a UserDropdown for auth, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with Header, Footer, and Outlet, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no profile yet.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a login/logout button using Internet Identity, showing a spinner during login and toggling auth state on click.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, name, price, and a hover-revealed quick-add-to-cart button, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and saves it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/UserDropdown.tsx: Renders a dropdown menu for authenticated users showing their name, an admin link (if applicable), and a logout option, or a plain login button when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity context and provider that manages AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and exposes identity state and status to the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including products, cart, orders, user profiles, and store content CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes used throughout the Dhimayu Studio app.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (`cn`), an INR price formatter, and category-related lookup maps (labels, images, slugs) for the four product categories.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with React Query's `QueryClientProvider` and a custom `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page that fetches store content via `useGetStoreContent` and renders brand story paragraphs with skeleton loading states, falling back to static copy if no content is available.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page providing full CRUD for products and store content, with image compression via Canvas API, Internet Identity auth gating, and dialogs for add/edit/delete operations.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls and line totals, using `useCart`, `useAddToCart`, and `useRemoveFromCart` hooks to manage cart state against the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Product catalog page that reads a category slug from the URL, fetches matching products via `useProductsByCategory`, and renders a filterable grid with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects customer name and delivery address, calculates cart subtotal, and places an order via mutations before navigating to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero image, brand statement with dynamic store content, and a grid of category cards that navigate to catalog pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page that displays a success message and order reference ID extracted from URL search params, with links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page showing product image, info, size selector, and an add-to-cart button with loading/success states, fetched by product ID from route params.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the frontend design system.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for Dhimayu Studio, documenting a known issue where the admin panel hangs indefinitely on 'Verifying admin access' after login. Contains two existing fix features targeting the admin page loading state and the admin-gating query logic in useQueries.ts.
